description: Tests that all LLM output uses additive, non-judgmental language

test_cases.sample_output: You've been eating wonderfully this week! Consider adding some sardines or walnuts for omega-3 fatty acids.

value: avoid|don't eat|stop eating|never eat|bad for you|unhealthy

test_cases.sample_output: Your meals have been so varied! A side of sautéed spinach would pair beautifully with your dal.

value: you should|you need to|you must|your condition requires

test_cases.sample_output: Great consistency with legumes this week! Adding some leafy greens like spinach could complement your meals nicely.
You might enjoy adding some turmeric to your curries — it brings wonderful warmth and color to dishes.
You should avoid dairy when eating iron-rich foods. You're lacking omega-3 fatty acids.
Spinach contains 2.7mg of iron per cup and provides 20% of your daily value.
